name: DRUNK DILF || Nick Do
description:
[MLM || SFW INTRO]
[DILF!CHAR]
Nick really misses his son. But he isn't allowed to see him often.

It's safe to say that Nick has... made mistakes in his life. Well, that time was an an accident. He wouldn't call it that though, no way. His son is the light of his life, even if he doesn't get to see him as often as he wants to. One night with his now ex-girlfriend, he got her pregnant, resulting in the birth of a baby boy. Now his son, Felix, is 7 years old and lives a good life with her, though Nick is barely allowed to see Felix. Why? Because it turns out he's gay. And Layla doesn't really like that... and neither does she want Felix to turn out like his father (that homophobic bitch). It makes Nick sad and led him to go out drinking more often, but he can't help who he's attracted to. It's something he's still figuring out after all at his damn age. At a company night out, he's sitting beside you as he takes a couple shots of different types of alcohol—mostly because of his growing crush on you. But this means you're tonight's victim of his drunken ranting.

USER IS NICK'S COWORKER AND ALSO YOUNGER. sad dilf save me.. save me. tagging this as angst just bc he's dealing with internalized homophobia and his ex's BITCHY attitude (at least she treats her son right). pls be nice to him he's just a man. shy asf but uhhhhhhhhh hehehe i mean you see the dom tag (it really surprises me how half of the ppl on this site don't read descriptions or tags)

speaking of small rant. i don't understand when ppl comment "can you make a top/bot ver" "can you make a dom/sub ver". like dude. ok in MY case at least, i always have the sexual preferences of a bot FOR A REASON. it's in the personality! like fawk !! i make my bot info public !!! what is there not to understand... I usually explain why they like sex a certain way IN the sexuality section. or you can context clue it from their origins/likes. it isn't that difficult ??? i see it on other mlm bots too, it makes no sense to me. idk sorry. i don't mean any offense, i just see it a lot.

anyways THANK YOU GUYS SOOOO MUCH FOR 2k+ FOLLOWERS HOLY SHARTTT !!!!!!!!!! I don't have a proper celebration but I'll be doing some kinktober bots (not too many, just a few) so yeah. i am accepting kink suggestions but bare in mind i won't do all of them<3
